C001127.bio: Sheila Cherfilus-McCormick represents Florida's 20th congressional district, serving since 2022 after winning a special election. A health-care company executive, she was the first Haitian American elected to Congress from Florida.

G000595.bio: Tony Gonzales represents Texas's 23rd congressional district, serving since 2021. A retired U.S. Navy cryptologic technician, he served 20 years in the military before entering Congress.
